output.task: Validate that user-submitted content meets format requirements, classify the content type and risk level, then route to appropriate review queue.

solution_steps.details: Parse title, body, tags, media links, author info, timestamps.
Check required fields present, length limits, allowed character sets, media type compatibility.
Use NLP for text, image recognition for media; assign primary type and subcategories.
Apply policy rules (e.g., hate speech, nudity) combined with ML confidence scores to produce risk level: low, medium, high.
Low → automated compliance check; Medium → human moderator queue; High → escalation to senior review or legal team.

quality_self_assessment.justification: All required steps are covered, clear actions and expected outcomes defined, aligns with industry best practices.
